access_requirements: exact supported SDK and local credentials

entries.point_in_time_semantics: timezone-naive session date; inclusive bounded range and ascending count-back verified; current incomplete candle excluded
entries.row_request_range_limits: count_back 1..10000 or bounded 3660-day range
entries.known_units_and_signs: volume is matched trading volume; value is vendor trading value with currency scale unverified
entries.known_revision_behavior: completed-candle selection verified; vendor correction behavior UNVERIFIED
entries.blocking_reason: none for the existing foundation; currency-scale arithmetic remains prohibited
